race.comment: RACE FOR RULE (9) looks nicely placed here off two good runs to date, just finding one better in both outings, well backed last time at Ballarat when getting within a length. She got home well there and should be very hard to hold out. EXPANDING POWER (7) was in the market first up at Sale when getting back in the field. Up to 1400m should suit nicely and she can settle closer now. NIGHT GUARD (2) wasn't far away first up at Mornington in a bunched finish, one of the better runs in the race given where he got to in the run. Up in trip now, look for improvement. FEAR THE IMPACT (1) struggled on the soft going at Moe latest but had been good here fresh and he can bounce back on firmer footing. URBAN CREED (5) is a gelding by Street Boss on debut who can run well.
